item.name: Features

body.raw:
/***************************************************************************
Supported Design File Formats: PNG, JPG
Documentation: https://docs.melcocloud.com/articles/auto-digitizing/artwork-filter
Supported Values for filter_type: 
0   = Clean  [Default]
1   = Default
2   = LineArt
4   = Noisy
***************************************************************************/
{
    "design":{
        "type":"base64",
        "data":"{{ARTWORK_BASE64}}",
        "file_name":"sun1.jpg",  
        "filter_type":1   //Any value from above list is supported 
    },
    "output_file_name":"sun1.svg"
}

item.description:
#1: All the examples are supported in Base64Workflow and HttpUrlWorkflow

#2: Multiple Features can be combined into one API call.
